My Hero Academia

僕のヒーローアカデミア

Studio: Bones
Director: Kenji Nagasaki

In a world where most people have superpowers called "Quirks," Izuku Midoriya dreams of becoming a hero despite being born without powers.

Action Superhero School
9.2 5,432,100

Episodes

  • Episode 1 Izuku Midoriya: Origin 2016-04-03 24:00
  • Episode 2 What It Takes to Be a Hero 2016-04-10 24:00
  • Episode 3 Roaring Muscles 2016-04-17 24:00

Episode 1: Izuku Midoriya: Origin

Izuku Midoriya desperately wants to be a hero, but he's one of the few who was born without a superpower, or "Quirk."

English Japanese
